page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at 2.5 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core execution, such as stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core tests, falls into the bottom 25% tier, with single-threaded gzip compression registering in the bottom 10%. However, multi-core benchmarks, including stress-ng multi-core, PassMark CPU, and Geekbench multi-core, consistently perform in the middle 50% average tier. Memory bandwidth tests for both cached and uncached reads and writes also align with average performance tiers.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.sn2.3xlarge offers stable resource density for workloads that can leverage parallel processing to overcome modest single-core speeds. It is suited for multi-threaded applications, static web serving, Redis database operations, and moderate software compilation tasks. The absence of local storage means workloads must rely on network-attached storage, which is supported by the 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks reveal a contrast between weak single-core execution and average multi-core capabilities, with multi-threaded decompression, PassMark CPU, and Redis operations all scoring in the middle 50% tier. This resource profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-effective for balanced, multi-threaded workloads rather than single-threaded compute-bound tasks. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, static web serving, software compilation, and database operations that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation and a standard 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64.0 GB of RAM, and 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core performance.

tagline: A dedicated general-purpose virtual machine featuring a balanced resource profile and stable multi-core performance for parallelized workloads.

3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Weak single-core performance offset by stable multi-threaded execution
Suitable for static web serving, database operations, and software compilation
